---
title: "Raborn Decision Sciences"
description: "Applied analytics and custom R/Shiny tools for measurement, operations, and planning."
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
# Applied analytics and R-powered tools for better decisions

Raborn Decision Sciences helps individuals and organizations translate complex measurement, operational, and planning questions into defensible analyses, reproducible workflows, and usable decision-support tools.

[Explore services](services.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} 
[View tools](tools.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary} 
[Contact me](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-tertiary}

:::

## What I do

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.rds-card}
### Assessment & Psychometrics

Item analysis, form analysis, DIF, equating, standard setting support, technical reporting, and validity evidence.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.rds-card}
### R/Shiny Decision Tools

Custom interactive applications, Quarto reporting workflows, R package development and support, dashboards, and analytic automation.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.rds-card}
### Operations & Planning Models

Break-even tools, capacity planning, pricing scenarios, and interactive models for  service-based organizations.
:::
:::

::::

::: {.decision-point}
**Decision point:** The goal is not just analysis. The goal is a tool, workflow, or report that helps someone make a clearer decision.
:::

## Decision-making tools you can trust

![](assets/ShinyShortForm-Screenshot.png)

Built on psychometrics, statistical programming, reproducible research, and practical decision support.

```{=html}
<style>
/* 1. The container hides everything outside its bounds */
.ticker-container {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: $body-bg;
  color: $body-color;
  padding: 10px 0;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* 2. The wrapper contains two identical sets of content */
.ticker-wrapper {
  display: inline-block;
  animation: seamless-scroll 20s linear infinite;
}

.ticker-item {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0 40px;
  font-weight: bold;
}

/* 3. Animate exactly half the total width of the wrapper */
@keyframes seamless-scroll {
  from { transform: translateX(0); }
  to { transform: translateX(-50%); }
}

/* Pause on hover for readability */
.ticker-container:hover .ticker-wrapper {
  animation-play-state: paused;
}
</style>

<div class="ticker-container">
  <div class="ticker-wrapper">
        <!-- Set 1 -->
        <div class="ticker-item">R</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Shiny</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Quarto</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">SQL</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Git/GitHub</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Winsteps</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">flexMIRT</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Mplus</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Python</div>
        <!-- Set 2 -->
        <div class="ticker-item">R</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Shiny</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Quarto</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">SQL</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Git/GitHub</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Winsteps</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">flexMIRT</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Mplus</div>
        <div class="ticker-item">Python</div>
    </div>
</div>
```

:::: {.grid .align-items-center}

::: {.g-col-12}
## Expert-led quantitative consulting

Raborn Decision Sciences is led by Anthony Raborn, a psychometrician/statistician focused on applied measurement, reproducible analytics, and custom R/Shiny tools.

[About Anthony](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

::::
